servers.name: central-mcp
servers.description: Platform-wide service hub. Governor-scope: audit-alert emails only.
servers.notes: Set CENTRAL_MCP_TOKEN env in .env after operator provisions a governor-scope token in central-mcp config. Then flip enabled to true.

servers.name: placeholder-local
servers.description: Replace with local MCP servers the governor needs (Data Brain endpoints once Pillar 2 is online).
